## Source: amazon-inspector (24e0a829db4a908047174ccb540d590c9df780c994d9ecc1b1705247f89612de)
The package cloudera-poc was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (3e073d1a895dbbd4c3b2e29e80e1ffa3910126e3149e6faece0b58c30635eb83)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'cloudera-poc' @ 99.1.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.
